reservation.source_phrase: Online ticket reservations are strongly encouraged due to our museum capacity.
reservation.source_block:
Tickets are available in-person on a first-come, first-serve basis for all visitors, regardless of discount or membership used. Online ticket reservations are strongly encouraged due to our museum capacity.

Sold out online? We have walk-in tickets available every day. You just may need to wait a bit if we are operating on a one-in, one-out basis.

hours.source_phrase: Wednesdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Thursdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Fridays: 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Saturdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 12:00 pm – 2:00 pm, 2:00 pm – 4:00 pm Sundays: 12:00 pm – 2:00 pm, 2:00pm – 4:00pm
hours.source_block:
Hours of Operation

Wednesdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Thursdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Fridays: 9:00 am – 12:00 pm & 1:00 pm – 4:00 pm (Closed 12:00-1:00PM) Saturdays : 9:00 am – 12:00 pm, 12:00 pm – 2:00 pm, 2:00 pm – 4:00 pm Sundays: 12:00 pm – 2:00 pm, 2:00pm – 4:00pm

Please check the monthly calendar on our homepage for any schedule changes, such as holiday closures or special school break hours.
